title: Happy International Women's Day 2026: Top 10 AI prompts to make cinematic photos on ChatGPT, Nano Banana, Grok, others

Action. For ALL Women and Girls’, and we've brought you some AI prompts to generate images to mark the occasion.

title: Samsung Galaxy A36, A56 specifications leaked ahead of launch, price range tipped
summary: Samsung's Galaxy A37 and A57 could launch soon and could feature a triple rear camera setup and 6.7-inch displays. The A37 could be 7.4mm thick, while the A57 could be slimmer at 6.9mm.&nbsp;

title: Nothing Phone 4a vs Motorola Edge 70 Fusion: India price, specs, battery and more compared
summary: Motorola and Nothing compete in the mid-range segment with their new phones. The Motorola Edge 70 Fusion offers better battery life, durability, and display, while the Nothing Phone 4a focuses on design and camera versatility.&nbsp;

title: Realme C83 5G with 7,000mAh battery and Dimensity 6300 SoC launched in india, price starts at ₹13,499
summary: Realme C83 5G is launched in India featuring a 7000mAh battery, 6.7-inch LCD display, and MediaTek Dimensity 6300 processor. The phone starts at a price of ₹13,499.

title: Motorola Edge 70 Fusion with 7,000mAh battery, Snapdragon 7s Gen 4 SoC launched in India: Price, specs and more
summary: Motorola Edge 70 Fusion with 6.78-inch AMOLED display, Snapdragon 7s Gen 4 processor, and a 7000mAh battery has been launched in India. The phone starts at a price of ₹ ₹26,999 and goes up to ₹32,999 for the top end variant.

title: WhatsApp could soon offer a paid subscription tier with exclusive stickers and ringtones: Report
summary: WhatsApp is reportedly developing a premium subscription plan called WhatsApp Plus. The new plan could offer features like customized app icon options, increased chat pinning, exclusive ringtones, and stickers.&nbsp;

title: Meta Ray-Bans may have exposed your most intimate moments: Here's what every owner must do immediately
summary: Meta is facing scrutiny for its privacy policies regarding user data collection through devices like Ray-Ban Smart Glasses. Cybersecurity experts highlight loopholes that compromise data safety, urging users to disable unnecessary sharing and be vigilant about their recordings.

title: Nothing Phone 4a with Snapdragon 7s Gen 4 processor, Glyph Bar launched in India: Price, specs and more
summary: Nothing has launched the Phone (4a), a mid-range smartphone featuring a 50MP periscope telephoto lens and a 6.78-inch AMOLED display. The phone offers a Snapdragon 7s Gen 4 processor, 12GB RAM, and a 5,400mAh battery, available in four colors via Flipkart.

title: Apple launches Mac Neo at ₹69,900: Top features, specs and how it compares to MacBook Air
summary: Apple's MacBook Neo is an entry-level laptop aimed at students, featuring a 13-inch Liquid Retina display, A18 Pro processor, and macOS Tahoe. It offers 16 hours of battery life, a 1080p FaceTime HD camera, and weighs 2.7 pounds, making it a competitive option against the MacBook Air and Pro.

title: Tencent is said to be back on Paramount-Warner Bros deal with fresh funding
summary: Tencent is considering investing several hundred million dollars in Paramount’s acquisition of Warner Bros. The Chinese company would act as a passive financial investor. title: Gulf crisis weighs on hyperscalers; Instant help’s costly blitz
summary: Happy Monday! Hyperscalers are seeking safe havens for data centre ops outside of West Asia. This and more in today’s ETtech Morning Dispatch.

title: Playbook Partners leads a $11 million round in enterprise technology firm KaarTech
summary: Through this infusion, Playbook Partners joins existing investors like Mumbai-based A91 Partners, which currently owns around 30% in the firm. A91 Partners had invested $30 million into KaarTech in 2023. The round valued KaarTech at Rs 2,000 crore.

title: AWS, Microsoft Azure may reroute West Asia data centre workload to India
summary: On March 2, two Amazon Web Services (AWS) data centres in the United Arab Emirates and one in Bahrain were struck by drones, hitting local banking apps, airport operations in Dubai and Kuwait, and the UAE stock market, which had to be closed due to tech outages.

title: US policy changes could cut H-1B visa applications sharply: Experts
summary: Applications for the H-1B visa for skilled non-immigrant workers may drop by about 50% after policy changes by the Trump administration. A $100,000 fee and wage-based selection have reduced filings. Experts say entry-level applicants, IT outsourcing firms and international students face tougher odds
